# Copilot Instructions

Read `../AGENTS.md` first. Copilot's path-specific durable instructions live in `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` and use `applyTo` front matter.

Do not duplicate rule content here. If a durable instruction is missing, add it to the smallest scoped `AGENTS.md` file or `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` file and keep this file as a compatibility pointer. Use `/instructions` or `/env` to confirm which instruction files the current Copilot client loaded.
